a.xlink:title: Base class for context-aware caching of OpenGL object instances.
Concrete CRTP class for context-aware caching of OpenGL object instances.
Inherit from this class if your class should be neither copy-constructible nor assignable.
Convenience class for a shader implementing a basic fixed function rendering pipeline.
Helper class to easily render a full-screen quad.
Convenience class for a shader implementing thick and stippled line rendering.
Helper class to perform deferred off-screen rendering.
Utility class to perform text rendering with OpenGL.
Specialization of GlReduction performing a ReductionOperator::AVERAGE reduction.
Specialization of GlReduction performing a ReductionOperator::MAX reduction.
Specialization of GlReduction performing a ReductionOperator::MIN reduction.
Specialization of GlReduction performing a ReductionOperator::PRODUCT reduction.
Specialization of GlReduction performing a ReductionOperator::SUM reduction.
Read single intensity values from an OpenGL texture.
The ThumbnailManager class generates and manages thumbnails for data instances.
